_comment: Hand-authored game slice for the lighthouse (phare) scene. Loaded by WorldDirector because it sits beside sf_phare.tscn / sraw_phare.tscn. See godot/game/data/GAME_JSON_SCHEMA.md. Anchors use xz_frac so they stay correct regardless of the scan's absolute scale/position.

start.speaker: The Keeper
start.text: Storm's rolling in off the water and the old cliff beacon's gone dark. These bones won't make the climb — will you check it for me?

grateful.speaker: The Keeper
grateful.text: Bless you. Follow the cliff path to the western edge — you'll find the beacon there. Come tell me once you've seen it.

decline.speaker: The Keeper
decline.text: Don't wait too long. That light's saved more souls than I can count.

start.speaker: The Keeper
start.text: The beacon still waits, friend — out on the western cliff. Don't tarry; the storm won't.

start.speaker: The Keeper
start.text: You saw it dark with your own eyes, then? Then these old bones have one climb left in them after all. Bless you.

start.speaker: The Keeper
start.text: The light burns true again. Every ship out on that water owes you a quiet debt.

start.speaker: Maren
start.text: You're the one the Keeper's been waiting for? Mind the western path — the rocks turn slick when the spray comes up.

start.speaker: Maren
start.text: So the old man's beacon burns again. Knew you had it in you.
